provenance.source_name: U.S. Census Bureau ACS 5-Year (2019-2023), table B28002
provenance.numerator_label: Households with a broadband Internet subscription (any type)
provenance.notes: Numerator is broadband subscription in the household (adoption). This is NOT the FCC BDC availability metric (which measures whether service reaches a location). ACS 5-Year has full 83-county coverage in Michigan and does not suppress at county level for this table. When populated, values are direct Census tabulations; when status = 'pending-ci', the ingest environment lacked CENSUS_API_KEY and the file must be re-run in CI to populate.

counties.pendingReason: Requires CENSUS_API_KEY. Run refresh-acs-broadband-county.mjs in CI with the key set to populate real values.
